title: Welcome to Minecraft Education
description: Getting started with Minecraft Education Edition

content.text:
Welcome to Minecraft Education!

Minecraft Education Edition is a game-based learning platform that promotes creativity, collaboration, and problem-solving.

What You'll Learn:

  • How to navigate the Minecraft world
  • Basic controls and movement
  • Understanding the game interface
  • Setting up your first world

Getting Started:

When you first open Minecraft Education, you'll see the main menu. From here, you can create new worlds, join multiplayer games, or access lesson plans.

Key Controls:

  • WASD - Move around
  • Space - Jump
  • Mouse - Look around
  • Left Click - Break blocks
  • Right Click - Place blocks
content.task: Open Minecraft Education and create a new world. Practice moving around using WASD keys and jumping with Space.
